---
title: "Jane Doe"
image: /images/avatar_female.png
about: 
  template: trestles
  image-shape: round
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/
      target: _blank
---

::: callout-important
To customize your About page, [check out the documentation here](https://quarto.org/docs/websites/website-about.html){target="_blank"}... and remember to remove this callout box BEFORE publishing your site at the end of the semester!
:::
